summary.uz: App Router, locale routing va data layer birga qanday ishlashi kerak?
summary.en: How should App Router, locale routing, and a data layer work together?

content.uz: Portfolio sayt uchun [locale] route'lari, reusable componentlar va keyinchalik API bilan ulanishni soddalashtiruvchi qatlam qurmoqchiman. Sahifalar juda ko'p bo'lsa ham arxitektura toza qolishi kerak.
content.en: For a portfolio site, I want [locale] routes, reusable components, and a layer that makes future API integration simple. Even with many pages, the architecture should stay clean.

text.uz: Men odatda `src/data` va `src/lib/data`ni alohida qilaman. UI hech qachon JSON'ni to'g'ridan-to'g'ri o'qimaydi.
text.en: I usually separate `src/data` and `src/lib/data`. The UI never reads JSON directly.

text.uz: Shunda keyinchalik Python API'dan fetch qilish juda oson bo'ladi. Men ham shu usulni tavsiya qilaman.
text.en: That makes switching to a Python API much easier later. I recommend the same approach.

title.en: Python API structure for a portfolio

summary.uz: Blog, portfolio va muhokama ma'lumotlari uchun qanday endpointlar qulay?
summary.en: What endpoints are practical for blog, portfolio, and discussion data?

content.uz: Frontend oldin mock data bilan ishlaydi. Keyin esa `/api/posts`, `/api/projects`, `/api/discussions` kabi endpointlar ulanishi kerak.
content.en: The frontend starts with mock data. Later, endpoints like `/api/posts`, `/api/projects`, and `/api/discussions` should be connected.

text.uz: List va detail endpointlarni alohida saqlang. Paginationni ham erta rejalashtiring.
text.en: Keep list and detail endpoints separate. Plan pagination early.
